mapper.select: SELECT t.*, COUNT(a.id) AS article_count FROM article_tags t LEFT JOIN article_tag_relations atr ON t.id = atr.tag_id LEFT JOIN articles a ON atr.article_id = a.id AND a.status = 2 GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.id
select t.* from article_tags t inner join article_tag_relations atr on t.id = atr.tag_id where atr.article_id = #{articleId} order by t.id
mapper.delete:
delete from article_tag_relations where article_id in
#{id}

delete from article_tag_relations where tag_id in
#{id}
